response.global_analysis: The video segment captures the performance of 'Disintegration' (cover of m.o.v.e), followed by a dialogue segment, and the start of 'Lioness' Pride'. No relevant lyrics were found in the Reference JSON (which only covered up to 04:59), so I relied on on-screen text for English lyrics and audio transcription for Japanese vocals and dialogue. Timestamps are strictly aligned with vocal onset, ensuring precision for the bilingual lyrics and fast-paced rap sections.

subtitles.original: two eyes in the face of billions of voices
subtitles.english: two eyes in the face of billions of voices

subtitles.original: I saw the flashing lights move further in the distance
subtitles.english: I saw the flashing lights move further in the distance

subtitles.original: and outside these walls that I have created
subtitles.english: and outside these walls that I have created

subtitles.original: 歪んだ鏡に 映る自分さえ
subtitles.english: Even my own reflection in the distorted mirror

subtitles.original: 誰だか分からずに 問いかけ続けてた
subtitles.english: I kept asking, not knowing who it was

subtitles.original: 崩壊してゆく 記憶の狭間で
subtitles.english: In the threshold of memories that are crumbling away

subtitles.original: 真実の姿を 探し求めていた
subtitles.english: I was searching for my true self

subtitles.original: 不確かなものばかりの この世界で
subtitles.english: In this world full of uncertain things

subtitles.original: 確かなものを ひとつ見つけたから
もう迷わない 振り返りはしない
subtitles.english: I won't hesitate anymore, I won't look back

subtitles.original: 明日へと続く道を 歩き出すよ
subtitles.english: I'll start walking the path that continues to tomorrow

subtitles.original: check it out, check it out
subtitles.english: check it out, check it out

subtitles.original: ありがとうございましたー！
改めまして、獅白ぼたんです！
今日は私の誕生日ライブに来てくれて本当にありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much for coming to my birthday live today!

subtitles.original: 1曲目は「breath of stella」、そして2曲目は「Disintegration」をお届けしました。
subtitles.english: The first song was "breath of stella", and the second was "Disintegration".

subtitles.original: Disintegrationはね、昔から大好きな曲で、いつかライブで歌いたいなと思ってたので、
subtitles.english: Disintegration is a song I've loved for a long time, and I've always wanted to sing it live,

subtitles.original: 今日こうして披露できて嬉しいです！
subtitles.english: so I'm happy to be able to perform it like this today!

subtitles.original: わためぇと一緒に歌った「breath of stella」も最高だったよね！
subtitles.english: "breath of stella" which I sang with Watame was also great, wasn't it!

subtitles.original: 3D LIVEということで、色んな演出もこだわってみたんですけど、どうかな？
subtitles.english: Since it's a 3D LIVE, I also put a lot of thought into various effects, how do you like it?

subtitles.original: この背景の崩壊した街とかも、曲の雰囲気に合わせて作ってもらいました。
subtitles.english: The background of the collapsed city was also made to match the atmosphere of the song.

subtitles.original: そして！今日はゲストにわためぇが来てくれましたけど、この後も素敵なゲストが登場するかも...？
subtitles.english: And! Watame came as a guest today, but there might be more wonderful guests appearing later...?

subtitles.original: 最後まで楽しんでいってくださいね！
それでは、続いての曲にいきたいと思います。
subtitles.english: Now then, I'd like to move on to the next song.

subtitles.original: 誰もいない 荒野を独り
風を受けて 走り続ける
subtitles.english: I keep running with the wind

subtitles.original: 迷いなんてない この場所で
subtitles.english: There's no hesitation in this place
